word: G1912 - ἐπιβαρέω - epibaréō - ep-ee-bar-eh'-o - Be chargeable to

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Be chargeable to
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to put a burden upon, to load
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1909 and G916; to be heavy upon, that is, (pecuniarily) to be expensive to; figuratively to be severe towards: - be chargeable to, overcharge.
